entries.cypher:
MATCH (ta:TypeAliasDeclaration) WHERE ta.name contains 'Model'
RETURN ta
entries.intent: Find TypeAliasDeclaration where TypeAliasDeclaration name contains 'Model'

entries.cypher:
MATCH (pae:PropertyAccessExpression {name: 'subscribe'})
RETURN pae
entries.intent: Find PropertyAccessExpression with name 'subscribe'

entries.cypher: MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration) RETURN p
entries.intent: Find PropertyDeclaration

entries.cypher:
MATCH (d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(obj:ObjectLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_PROPERTY]->(prop {name: 'changeDetection'})
WHERE d.firstIdentifier = 'Component'
RETURN d, prop
entries.intent: Find Decorator that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'changeDetection' where Decorator firstIdentifier equals 'Component

entries.cypher:
MATCH (d:Decorator {firstIdentifier: 'Component'})-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(obj:ObjectLiteralExpression)
OPTIONAL MATCH (obj)-[:HAS_PROPERTY]->(prop {name: 'changeDetection'})
RETURN d, prop
entries.intent: Find Decorator with firstIdentifier 'Component' that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression and optionally find this ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'changeDetection

entries.cypher:
MATCH (d:Decorator {firstIdentifier: 'Component'})-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(obj:ObjectLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_PROPERTY]->(prop)
WHERE prop.name IN ['templateUrl', 'styleUrls', 'styleUrl', 'template', 'styles']
RETURN d, prop
entries.intent: Find Decorator with firstIdentifier 'Component' that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression that has property where property name is ['templateUrl', 'styleUrls', 'styleUrl', 'template', 'styles']

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(prop:PropertyDeclaration)
OPTIONAL MATCH (prop)-[:HAS_MODIFIER]->(mod:ReadonlyKeyword)
RETURN prop, mod
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration or InterfaceDeclaration or TypeAliasDeclaration that has member PropertyDeclaration and optionally find this PropertyDeclaration that has modifier ReadonlyKeyword

entries.cypher:
MATCH (d:Decorator {firstIdentifier: 'Injectable'})-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(obj:ObjectLiteralExpression)
OPTIONAL MATCH (obj)-[:HAS_PROPERTY]->(prop {name: 'providedIn'})
RETURN d, prop
entries.intent: Find Decorator with firstIdentifier 'Injectable' that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression and optionally find this ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'providedIn

entries.cypher:
MATCH (d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(obj:ObjectLiteralExpression)
OPTIONAL MATCH (obj)-[:HAS_PROPERTY]->(prop {name: 'standalone'})
WHERE d.firstIdentifier IN ['Component', 'Directive', 'Pipe']
RETURN d, prop
entries.intent: Find Decorator that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression and optionally find this ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'standalone' where Decorator firstIdentifier is ['Component', 'Directive', 'Pipe']

entries.cypher: MATCH (pe:PropertyAccessExpression)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(:CallExpression {firstIdentifier: 'pipe'})-[:HAS_ARGUMENT]->(op:CallExpression) RETURN op
entries.intent: Find PropertyAccessExpression that has descendant CallExpression with firstIdentifier 'pipe' that has argument CallExpression

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m:MethodDeclaration|PropertyDeclaration|GetAccessor)
OPTIONAL MATCH (m)-[:HAS_INITIALIZER]->(init)
RETURN m, init
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration that has member either MethodDeclaration or PropertyDeclaration or GetAccessor and optionally find this member that has initializer

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration {name: 'App'})-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m:MethodDeclaration)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ret:ReturnStatement)
RETURN m, ret
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration with name 'App' that has member MethodDeclaration that has descendant ReturnStatement

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(prop:PropertyDeclaration)
WHERE prop.name STARTS WITH '_'
RETURN prop
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration that has member PropertyDeclaration where PropertyDeclaration name starts with '_

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)
WHERE d.firstIdentifier = 'Injectable' AND c.name ENDS WITH 'Service'
RETURN c, d
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator where decorator firstIdentifier equals 'Injectable' and ClassDeclaration name ends with 'Service

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(:Constructor)-[:HAS_PARAMETER]->(n:Parameter)
WHERE id.text IN ['Component', 'Directive', 'Pipe', 'Injectable']
RETURN c, n
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator that has descendant Identifier that has symbol import from '@angular/core' and also find this ClassDeclaration that has member Constructor that has parameter where Identifier text is ['Component', 'Directive', 'Pipe', 'Injectable']

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(prop:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_INITIALIZER]->(init:CallExpression)-[:HAS_EXPRESSION]->(injectId:Identifier {text: 'inject'})-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
WHERE id.text IN ['Component', 'Directive', 'Pipe', 'Injectable']
RETURN c, prop
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator that has descendant Identifier that has symbol import from '@angular/core' and also find this ClassDeclaration that has member PropertyDeclaration that has initializer CallExpression that has expression Identifier with text 'inject' that has symbol import from '@angular/core' where decorator Identifier text is ['Component', 'Directive', 'Pipe', 'Injectable']

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(:Constructor)-[:HAS_PARAMETER]->(param:Parameter)
OPTIONAL MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(prop:PropertyDeclaration)-[:HAS_INITIALIZER]->(init:CallExpression)-[:HAS_EXPRESSION]->(injectId:Identifier {text: 'inject'})-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
WHERE id.text IN ['Component', 'Directive', 'Pipe', 'Injectable']
RETURN c, param, prop
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator that has descendant Identifier that has symbol import from '@angular/core' and optionally find this ClassDeclaration that has member Constructor that has parameter and optionally find this ClassDeclaration that has member PropertyDeclaration that has initializer CallExpression that has expression Identifier with text 'inject' that has symbol import from '@angular/core' where Identifier text is ['Component', 'Directive', 'Pipe', 'Injectable']

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier {text: 'NgModule'})-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (rD:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(:ObjectLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_PROPERTY]->(prop:PropertyAssignment {name: 'imports'})-[:HAS_INITIALIZER]->(arr:ArrayLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(rId:Identifier {text: c.name})
RETURN d, rD
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator that has descendant Identifier with text 'NgModule' that has symbol import from '@angular/core' and optionally find Decorator that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'imports' that has initializer ArrayLiteralExpression that has element Identifier with text matching this ClassDeclaration name

entries.cypher:
MATCH (moduleClass:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(moduleDecorator:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier {text: 'NgModule'})-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (moduleDecorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(:ObjectLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_PROPERTY]->(prop:PropertyAssignment {name: 'declarations'})-[:HAS_INITIALIZER]->(:ArrayLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(declaredId:Identifier)
MATCH (declaredClass:ClassDeclaration {name: declaredId.text})-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(declaredDecorator:Decorator)
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumerDecorator:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(:ObjectLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_PROPERTY]->(imp:PropertyAssignment {name: 'imports'})-[:HAS_INITIALIZER]->(:ArrayLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(:Identifier {text: moduleClass.name})
OPTIONAL MATCH (consumerDecorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(:ObjectLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_PROPERTY]->(decl:PropertyAssignment {name: 'declarations'})-[:HAS_INITIALIZER]->(:ArrayLiteralExpression)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(:Identifier)
RETURN moduleDecorator, declaredClass, declaredDecorator, consumerDecorator, decl
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator that has descendant Identifier with text 'NgModule' that has symbol import from '@angular/core' and also find this decorator that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'declarations' that has initializer ArrayLiteralExpression that has element Identifier and also find ClassDeclaration with name matching this Identifier text and also find this ClassDeclaration decorator and optionally find Decorator that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'imports' that has element Identifier with text matching this NgModule ClassDeclaration name and optionally find this consumer Decorator that has descendant ObjectLiteralExpression that has property with name 'declarations' that has element Identifier

entries.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(d:Decorator)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier {text: 'Component'})-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(:ImportDeclaration {moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core'})
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(m:MethodDeclaration|PropertyDeclaration|GetAccessor)
OPTIONAL MATCH (m)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(ret:ReturnStatement)-[:HAS_EXPRESSION]->(retExpr)
OPTIONAL MATCH (m)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(arrow:ArrowFunction)-[:HAS_BODY]->(bodyExpr:BinaryExpression|TemplateExpression|CallExpression|PropertyAccessExpression)
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(template:PropertyAssignment {name: 'template'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (d)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(templateUrl:PropertyAssignment {name: 'templateUrl'})
RETURN c, d, m, retExpr, bodyExpr, template, templateUrl
entries.intent: Find ClassDeclaration that has decorator that has descendant Identifier with text 'Component' and also find this ClassDeclaration that has member either MethodDeclaration or PropertyDeclaration or GetAccessor and optionally find this member that has descendant ReturnStatement that has expression and optionally find this member that has descendant ArrowFunction that has body either BinaryExpression or TemplateExpression or CallExpression or PropertyAccessExpression and optionally find this Decorator that has descendant PropertyAssignment with name 'template' and optionally find this Decorator that has descendant PropertyAssignment with name 'templateUrl
